prompt: Generate a photo editing software UI incorporating the tool icons from the first image, the layout from the second image, and the color palette from the third image.
prompt_refined: Generate a user interface (UI) for a desktop photo editing software. The UI should adopt the overall layout structure presented in image 2, including its top menu bar, the secondary toolbar with tab-like sections, a large central 'Before & After' split view for image display, a right-hand adjustment sidebar, and a bottom control bar. Incorporate the minimalist white line-art tool icons from image 1 (such as Filters, Exposure, Contrast, and Crop) into the right-hand adjustment sidebar and relevant tool sections. Apply the soft, pastel pink and white color palette observed in image 3 to all UI elements, ensuring a clean, modern, and inviting aesthetic throughout the interface.
objects: Minimalist white line-art tool icons (e.g., Filters, Exposure, Contrast, Crop)
Image displayed within the 'Before & After' view
Soft, pastel pink and white color palette applied to UI elements
UI elements arranged with the layout structure of Image 2
